ddls:
CREATE TABLE "compounds" (
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compound */,
  "smiles" TEXT /* Simplified molecular-input line-entry system (SMILES) string representing the compound */,
  "mw" REAL /* Molecular weight (MW) of the compound */,
  "logp" REAL /* Partition coefficient (logP) of the compound */,
  "h_bond_donor" INTEGER /* Number of hydrogen bond donors in the compound */,
  "h_bond_acceptor" INTEGER /* Number of hydrogen bond acceptors in the compound */,
  "rotatable_bonds" INTEGER /* Number of rotatable bonds in the compound */,
  "tpsa" REAL /* Topological polar surface area (TPSA) of the compound */,
  "ring_counts" INTEGER /* Number of ring structures in the compound */,
  "heavy_atoms_counts" INTEGER /* Number of heavy atoms in the compound */,
  "fraction_csp3" REAL /* Fraction of sp3-hybridized carbons in the compound */,
  "balaban_j_index" REAL /* Balaban J Index of the compound */,
  "pchembl_value" REAL /* pchembl value, a measure of the compound's biological activity */,
  "compound_name" TEXT /* Name of the compound */,
  "compound_description" TEXT /* Description of the compound */,
  "inchi_key" TEXT /* International Chemical Identifier (InChI) key of the compound */,
  "molecular_formula" TEXT /* Molecular formula of the compound */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compound_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a compound */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the compound */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_versions_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_versions_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  "permission_level" INTEGER /* Level of permission (e.g., 1 - view, 2 - view and edit, 3 - view, edit, and delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the compound */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the compound was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compound_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound the property belongs to */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "property_value" TEXT /* Value of the property */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* Description of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_properties_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compound_biological_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each biological activity entry */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound the activity belongs to */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of biological activity (e.g., pchembl value, IC50) */,
  "activity_value" REAL /* Value of the biological activity */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date of the test */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Description of the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_biological_activities_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compound_synonyms" (
  "synonym_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each synonym */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound the synonym belongs to */,
  "synonym_name" TEXT /* Name of the synonym */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("synonym_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_synonyms_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compound_external_references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound the reference belongs to */,
  "reference_type" TEXT /* Type of reference (e.g., PubMed, DOI) */,
  "reference_url" TEXT /* URL of the reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_external_references_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)
